nasb.text: This is how I will treat this place and its inhabitants,” declares the Lord, “so as to make this city like Topheth.

esv.text: Thus will I do to this place, declares the Lord, and to its inhabitants, making this city like Topheth.

cnv.text: 我必照樣對待這地方和這地方的居民，使這城像陀斐特一樣。’這是耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 我必这样惩罚这城和其中的居民，使这城像陀斐特一样。这是耶和华说的。
